demographics.living_situation: lives at home with partner, who is present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It is pouring out of both ends constantly since this morning, my stomach is in knots, and the room goes black when I try to stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've been vomiting and having watery diarrhoea non-stop since this morning, I can't keep any fluid down, and now I nearly black out every time I stand up.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly this morning, about 14 hours ago
symptom_narrative.character: watery diarrhoea pouring out constantly, forceful vomiting so I can't keep anything down, and crampy tummy pain that comes on before each trip to the toilet
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever felt — completely wiped out and stuck in bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: cramps all over my belly, not one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, running to the toilet every few minutes and being sick in between
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I can't keep fluids down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes the room go black and I nearly faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: aching all over, feel feverish and washed out, dizzy and light-headed, nearly blacking out whenever I stand
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound — I need my partner to help me get to the bathroom or I'd fall

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Ate takeaway chicken roughly a day (about 24 hours) before all this started. Lives with a partner who is helping care for them.

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: partner says they look pale, sweaty and very drained, with a dry mouth and dry, cracked lips
